articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Kaspersky identifies malware framework targeting crypto investors
articles.summary: Cybersecurity company Kaspersky said a newly identified malware framework is targeting cryptocurrency investors through social engineering tactics and trojanized GitHub apps.

articles.title: French gambling regulator orders ISPs to block Polymarket
articles.summary: France’s gambling authority has ordered the country’s internet service providers to geoblock Polymarket, citing illegal gambling and market manipulation concerns.

articles.title: FTX to distribute $900M to creditors in fifth payment round
articles.summary: The FTX Recovery Trust and company have distributed about $10 billion since the exchange filed for bankruptcy in November 2022, leaving users cut off from their funds.

articles.title: Bank of America taps new leaders to bridge crypto, AI and traditional finance
articles.summary: Sonali Theisen was named head of BofA's global digital assets platform, while Kevin Milsom was tapped to serve as head of AI transformation

articles.title: ECB Warns Stablecoins May Drain Bank Deposits—Here's What That Means
articles.summary: ECB board member Piero Cipollone laid out the three-layer threat banks face from digital payments, and pitched the digital euro as the only structural answer.

articles.title: Galaxy lands 15-year Texas Tech stadium naming rights deal
articles.summary: Galaxy Digital will rename Texas Tech’s football stadium under a 15-year agreement, expanding its West Texas presence as the state attracts growing crypto investment.

articles.title: CryptoQuant says Strategy still needs disciplined bitcoin buying and selling framework
articles.summary: CryptoQuant said Michael Saylor's Strategy still needs still needs clearer rules for when to buy and sell bitcoin.

articles.title: Consensys unknowingly outsourced developer work to North Korean
articles.summary: Through an introduction with a “reputable third-party service provider,“ the company took on a developer who, as part of an investigation, was revealed to be tied to North Korea.

articles.title: Crypto Biz: When dollars disappear, stablecoins step in
articles.summary: Bolivia moves to recognize USDT amid a dollar shortage, while Bitcoin miners’ AI ambitions face fresh investor scrutiny.

articles.title: Cardano Pumps as Network Moves to Further Decentralize Development
articles.summary: Input Output is handing its core infrastructure to outside teams as ADA gets a lift from an imminent protocol upgrade.

articles.title: Bitcoin Sentiment Is Turning Bullish — But It’s Too Early to Celebrate: Report
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Sentiment Is Turning Bullish — But It’s Too Early to Celebrate: Report
CoinShares has said that while investors have put money in crypto funds again, the Bitcoin price may still struggle.
This post Bitcoin Sentiment Is Turning Bullish — But It’s Too Early to Celebrate: Report first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Mathew Di Salvo.

articles.title: FTX to distribute roughly $900 million to creditors in fifth wave of payouts
articles.summary: So far the company's bankruptcy estate has distributed nearly $10 billion to creditors and other claimants since repayments began in 2025.

articles.title: Trezor exec pushes back on ZachXBT claim that hardware wallets are ‘complete garbage’
articles.summary: "I do not advise using them for important tasks like signing transactions or storing funds," ZachXBT wrote this week.

articles.title: Polymarket traders cut Clarity Act passage odds to record low as Senate delay drags on

articles.summary: Moonshot AI's 2.8-trillion-parameter open-weight model sent chip stocks tumbling and gave Wall Street a Friday it would rather forget.

articles.title: Ocean Mining VP Jason Hughes: BIP-110 on Track to Fail as Miner Signaling Stays Below 1%
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Ocean Mining VP Jason Hughes: BIP-110 on Track to Fail as Miner Signaling Stays Below 1%
Ocean Mining’s VP of Development and Engineering Jason Hughes argues BIP-110 lacks measurable consensus, with node signaling at 7-15% and hashrate support under 1% ahead of the critical block 961632 window.
This post Ocean Mining VP Jason Hughes: BIP-110 on Track to Fail as Miner Signaling Stays Below 1% first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Jason Hughes.

articles.title: SBI Holdings Takes Majority Stake in Singapore’s Coinhako After MAS Approval
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

SBI Holdings Takes Majority Stake in Singapore’s Coinhako After MAS Approval
SBI Holdings has acquired a majority stake in Singapore's Coinhako after MAS approval, strengthening its push to build a cross-border digital asset network across Japan and Southeast Asia.
This post SBI Holdings Takes Majority Stake in Singapore’s Coinhako After MAS Approval first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

articles.title: China’s Kimi K3 Is Out—And Beats Claude Fable and GPT 5.6 Sol on Key Benchmarks
articles.summary: Moonshot AI's 2.8-trillion-parameter model tops Fable 5 on a creative writing benchmark and leads Arena AI's frontend code leaderboard—at Claude Sonnet pricing.

articles.summary: The Nasdaq-listed digital-asset firm will rebrand the Red Raiders' home as "Galaxy Stadium." The bigger bet is on the cheap power and open land of West Texas.

articles.title: OKX Europe lets users convert USDT to MiCA-compliant USDC

articles.title: Senator Warren requests 2026 reporting for Trump’s crypto earnings after $1.4B disclosure
articles.summary: With the Senate likely voting on a crypto bill within days, Elizabeth Warren asked for information on Donald Trump’s earnings between January and July ahead of a 2027 deadline.

articles.title: Bitcoin slides toward $63,000 as Coinbase premium stays negative for a record 60 days
articles.summary: Bitcoin fell near $63,000 as chip stocks sold off, the Coinbase premium stayed negative a record 60 days, and ETF flows remain thin.

articles.title: Three Men Jailed for Posing as Police in $5.3M UK Crypto Fraud
